title: [MTR3/4]Korail Intercity & Regional Trains
description: This resourcepack adds Korail Intercity & Regional Trains for Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
## Introduction

This resource pack adds Korail Regional Trains

This pack requires Minecraft Transit Railway Mod (MTR3, MTR4 Beta 15~) and Nemo's Transit Expansion for MTR3 version (NTE)

Before using, please check the Readme included inside the pack!

MTR3 and MTR4 use different versions, and for MTR3, it is recommended to make appropriate number of the cars (information could be found in Spreadsheet - could be found at wiki link)

## Contents

_MTR3_, MTR4, **Both**

* **Korail NDC DMU**
* Korail Class 200000 EMU (Current livery, _old livery_)
* **Korail Class 8000 (Nez-Cassé)**
* **Korail Container Train**
* **Korail Class 368000 EMU**
* Korail Limited Carriage (**Saemaeul, Mugunghwa**, S-Train, Gyooe)
* Eyecandy Objects (Vending Machine, Ticket machine)
